## Summary

Updates the cooling function plot and (if needed) the cooling function test expected values for Cloudy updates.

**:warning: Draft PR** — do not mark as ready for review until the corresponding datasets PR for the new Cloudy tables has been merged. This ordering ensures CI workflows run against the correct Cloudy tables.

**Changes:**
- Updated `plots/cooling_function_Atomic_CIE_Cloudy.pdf` with cooling function plot generated from updated Cloudy tables
- Updated expected cooling function value in `source/tests/cooling_functions.F90` (if tables changed the cooling rate)
